title: प्रभु की मेज़ पर
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: This do in remembrance of me
This is my body which is given for you

story: A reverent communion bhajan from the North Indian Protestant tradition. This solemn hymn accompanies the Lord's Supper in churches across Hindi-speaking India. Its sacred melody guides the congregation into a spirit of grateful remembrance as they share in the bread and the cup together.

lines: प्रभु की मेज़ पर आए हैं हम
उसकी याद में जुड़े हैं हम
linesRomanized: Prabhu ki mez par aaye hain ham
Uski yaad mein jude hain ham

lines: जब तक वो लौटकर न आए
प्रभु की मेज़ पर एक होंगे
linesRomanized: Jab tak wo lautkar na aaye
Prabhu ki mez par ek honge
